BlockLooksLike.description:
Visual-signal-only guess at what a block resembles. Strictly
advisory: nothing downstream filters or groups by this value. The
user can sort/filter the preview by it to spot patterns.
BlockLooksLike.title: BlockLooksLike

BlockRegion.description:
Where a block sits on the page — derived from y-position only.
Advisory: a "footer"-region block isn't filtered out, it's just
flagged so the user can spot running-footer patterns at a glance.
BlockRegion.title: BlockRegion

description:
One text block from one page, as the parser saw it.

Blocks are deliberately unclassified — no "paragraph", no "heading",
no merging across page breaks. The pipeline's job is to extract;
classification and grouping happen downstream once the user has
spotted what to ignore in the preview.

bbox.description: Bounding box (x0, y0, x1, y1) in PDF points, top-left origin.
bbox.title: Bbox

block_id.description: Deterministic identifier of the form ``<doc_id>:p<page>:b<reading_order_index>`` — e.g. ``adb1-2022:p3:b7``. Stable across runs on the same PDF.
block_id.title: Block Id

doc_id.description: The document this block belongs to.
doc_id.title: Doc Id

font_name.description: Font name of the first span — e.g. 'Helvetica-Bold'.
font_name.title: Font Name

font_size.description: Font size of the first span in the block, in PDF points.
font_size.title: Font Size

is_bold.description: Whether the first span has the bold flag.
is_bold.title: Is Bold

is_italic.description: Whether the first span has the italic flag.
is_italic.title: Is Italic

looks_like.description: Advisory: a visual-signal-only guess at what kind of text this is. Based on font size relative to the document's char-weighted median body size, plus bold/italic flags. Strictly advisory.

reading_order_index.description: Position within the page in the parser's reading order. 0-indexed; unique per page.
reading_order_index.title: Reading Order Index

region.description: Advisory: where on the page this block sits. Computed from y-position relative to page height. Never used to filter anything — it's there so the user can spot header/footer patterns in the preview.

text.description: The block's textual content as the parser returned it.
text.title: Text

title: Block
